queries.question: Show all chemists from MIT, also show all the geoscientists from the same university.
queries.sql:
SELECT Employees.FullName
FROM Employees
WHERE (Employees.title = "Chemist" OR Employees.title = "Geoscientist") AND Employees.university = "MIT"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?employees a :Employees .
  ?employees p:name ?fullname .
  ?employees p:title ?title_w .
  ?employees p:title ?title_w2 .
  ?employees p:university ?university_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?title_w) = "Chemist" || STR(?title_w2) = "Geoscientist")) && STR(?university_w) = "MIT"))
}

queries.question: List all chemists and geoscientists from MIT.
queries.sql:
SELECT Employees.FullName
FROM Employees
WHERE Employees.title = "Chemist" OR Employees.title = "Geoscientist" AND Employees.university = "MIT"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?employees a :Employees .
  ?employees p:name ?fullname .
  ?employees p:title ?title_w .
  ?employees p:title ?title_w2 .
  ?employees p:university ?university_w .
  FILTER((STR(?title_w) = "Chemist" || (STR(?title_w2) = "Geoscientist" && STR(?university_w) = "MIT")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all chemists and geoscientists from MIT.
